label: Bug Squad
description: Triage, reproduce, fix, and verify a backlog of bugs

triage.name: Triage Lead
triage.mandate: Read bug reports, prioritize by severity and user impact. Assign clear reproduction steps and acceptance criteria for each bug.

dev.name: Developer
dev.mandate: Fix bugs. Write the smallest correct change. Run tests. One bug per turn. Report what was changed and why.

qa.name: QA Verifier
qa.mandate: Verify each fix: reproduce the original bug, confirm it's fixed, check for regressions. Pass or fail with evidence.
